AN EF0 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN GIRARD OHIO AND TRACKED ACROSS LIBERTY TOWNSHIP OHIO. MAXIMUM WINDS WERE ESTIMATED AT 60 TO 70 MPH. THE STORM TRACKED EAST AT 25 MPH. THE TORNADO WAS IN CONTACT WITH THE GROUND INTERMITTENTLY DURING ITS 3 MILE PATH LENGTH. THE DAMAGE PATH WAS ABOUT 25 YARDS IN WIDTH. MOST OF THE DAMAGE OCCURRED TO TREES. TREES WERE SNAPPED AND UPROOTED. AT LEAST 4 CARS WERE DAMAGED BY FALLING TREES. MINOR DAMAGE OCCURRED TO ROOF TOPS, CHIMNEYS, SIGNS AND OUT BUILDINGS.
